page_content:
Research Units The INFO College is home to a number of research centers and labs:

Advanced Information Collaboratory (AIC) https://ai-collaboratory.net/ The Advanced Information Collaboratory (AIC), founded in Feb. 2020 by UMD Professor Dr. Richard Marciano with 9 other collaborators, is an international research network that brings together over 70 students, researchers, and partners from around the globe to:

EXPLORE the opportunities and challenges of “disruptive

technologies” for archives and records management (digital curation, machine learning, AI, etc.).

LEVERAGE the latest technologies to unlock the hidden information
